title: Night's Light
description: A simple but configurable mod, that adds fireflies to the game
body:
![Night's Light - Fireflies](https://imgur.com/GZTW8aZ.png)
Banner among others created with Blockbench and the Minecraft Title Generator
[Source Code](https://github.com/DoctorGMystery/Fireflies) - [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/DoctorGMystery/Fireflies/issues)
Night's Light adds realistic, working fireflies to Minecraft. Made for Forge (1.20.1 and below) and NeoForge (1.20.4 and onwards - coming soon).

#### !!!NEWS!!! Version 1.20.4 and upwards will all be for NeoForge. 1.20.4 will come out when Citadel and JEI is ported to 1.20.4 NeoForge There will probably be no Version 1.20.2 or 1.20.3, because neither Citadel nor JEI support these Versions for NeoForge Support for 1.19.4 is now finally out! But that's not all: also support for 1.20 and 1.20.1 is now out too.

[CurseForge Site](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nights-light)
### Features - fireflies avoid water - they emit light - random flickering system - only emit light at daytime - spawn egg of fireflies integrated - configurable spawn biomes, weight and min - max group count - animated firefly lanterns with multiple levels - firefly in glass - colored firefly lanterns

#### !!!IMPORTANT!!! if you have EVER USED the MOD in a LOWER VERSION before, you HAVE TO DELET the 'firefly_spawns.json' MANUALY, start minecraft with the mod again and than the file will recreate itself, otherwise the fireflies will not spawn!!!

EXPLANATION SPAWNING CONFIG UP TO 1.18.2 [HERE](https://github.com/DoctorGMystery/Fireflies/wiki/Configure-Spawning-up-to-1.18.2)
EXPLANATION SPAWNING CONFIG SINCE 1.19 [HERE](https://github.com/DoctorGMystery/Fireflies/wiki/Configure-Spawning-since-1.19)

You can find the fireflies by default in these bioms:
Spoiler swamp
forest
jungle
jungle edge
jungle hills
birch forest
birch forest hills
tall birch forest
tall birch hills
dark forest
dark forest hills
flower forest
savanna
savanna plateau
shattered savanna plateau
shattered savanna
swamp hills


### Planned Currently there is no more feature planned, but feel free to write suggestions in the issue tab on github or in the curseforge comments I will continue to port the mod to the latest version

### Note This is the first mod I ever made (except for the learning mods) and also one of my first big Java projects, so for some the code could be horrible. Im open for suggestions for improvement and ideas!

### FAQ Q: Will there be a Fabric Version? A: There is no fabric version planned. Q: Can I add this mod to my modpack? A: Feel free to add this mod to your modpack.
